name: Donovan Surveyors, Inc.
description: State-licensed property surveying company and planner with over 50 years of experience serving land owners and developers, offering mortgage, title, topography, flood, and construction surveying

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Absolutely amazing outcome. Pricing is very reasonable and highly recommended.
Was able to schedule and get report for my property survey within a week.
They were easy to work with and made sure all our needs were taken care of.
Came out and got it done quickly and reasonably priced.

sentiment.summary: Donovan Surveyors has an excellent reputation with consistently positive reviews praising their quick turnaround, reasonable pricing, professional team, and customer-focused service.
